name: Link Decoder
desc:
1 Level 4 or lower Cyberse monster
If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Cyberse Link Monster with 2300 or more original ATK: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Link Decoder" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Level 4 or lower Cyberse monster
If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Cyberse Link Monster with 2300 or more original ATK: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Link Decoder" once per turn.
eff:
1 Level 4 or lower Cyberse monster
If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Cyberse Link Monster with 2300 or more original ATK: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Link Decoder" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: The Valuable Book EX 3 promotional cards

action: Activates if used as Link Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
